title: Add webglOpacity() style helper for WebGL series

in_scope: New webglOpacity() style module matching webglFillColor/webglStrokeColor API
Support constant value (.value(0.5)) and per-datum function (.value((d, i) => ...))
Fragment shader snippet with uOpacity uniform that multiplies gl_FragColor.a
Wire through programBuilder and series decorate pattern
Example in examples/ demonstrating constant and per-datum opacity
Standalone PR — include gl.BLEND lines if not already present (idempotent)
out_of_scope: Adding opacity to SVG or Canvas series (they already have it via decorate)
acceptance_criteria: fc.webglOpacity() is exported from d3fc-webgl and available on the fc global
.value(0.5) sets constant 50% opacity for all elements in the series
Opacity multiplies with fillColor alpha (0.5 opacity + 0.5 fillColor alpha = 0.25 effective)
Example demonstrates both constant and per-datum usage
dependencies: d3fc/d3fc#1899 (blending fix) — included in PR as idempotent lines
assumptions: Fragment shader pipeline supports appending new uniform snippets
attributeProjector pattern works for per-datum float values (not just vec4)
webglFillColor's dirty tracking pattern is the correct model to follow

risks.risk: Per-datum opacity may need a float attribute instead of vec4
risks.mitigation: Research attributeProjector to confirm float support before implementing

risks.risk: Shader snippet insertion order may affect opacity multiplication
risks.mitigation: Append opacity snippet after fillColor/strokeColor in fragment shader
